memoryArtifacts.headline: Peyton, John XVI de  Esquire story 1393-1416
memoryArtifacts.description: When John Peyton was born in 1393, his father, John, was 29 and his mother, Jean, was 25. He had one son with Grace Burgoyne in 1417. He died as a young father on October 6, 1416, at the age of 23.

popularStory.headline: Peyton, John XVI de  Esquire story 1393-1416

zh.of, , Cambridgeshire, England: 英國英格蘭坎布利其爾
zh.Peyton Hall, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國英格蘭坎布利其爾

zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Peyton於1392年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾時，他的父親John Peyton28歲，母親Joan Sutton24歲。他於大約1409年與Grace Burgoyne在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1416年10月6日在他的家鄉享年24歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Peyton于1392年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾时，他的父亲John Peyton28岁，母亲Joan Sutton24岁。他于大约1409年与Grace Burgoyne在英国英格兰坎布利其爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1416年10月6日在他的家乡享年24岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Peyton was born in 1392, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Peyton, was 28 and his mother, Joan Sutton, was 24. He married Grace Burgoyne about 1409, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 6 October 1416, in his hometown, at the age of 24, and was buried in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Peyton est né en 1392, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Peyton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Sutton, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Grace Burgoyne environ 1409, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 6 octobre 1416, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterré à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Peyton 1392 in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Peyton 28 und seine Mutter Joan Sutton 24. Er hat um 1409 in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Grace Burgoyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 6. Oktober 1416 im Alter von 24 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Peyton è nato il nel 1392 nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Peyton, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Joan Sutton, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Grace Burgoyne circa 1409, nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 ottobre 1416, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 24 anni, e fu sepolto a Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Peytonが1392年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Peytonは28歳，母Joan Suttonは24歳であった。約1409年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアでGrace Burgoyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1416年10月6日に故郷で24歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Peyton(이)가 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Peyton(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Sutton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 Grace Burgoyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1416년 10월 6일 그의 고향에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Peyton nasceu em 1392, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Peyton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan Sutton, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Grace Burgoyne aproximadamente 1409, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1416, em sua cidade natal, com 24 anos, e foi sepultado em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Peyton родился в 1392 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Peyton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Sutton, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace Burgoyne около 1409 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 6 октября 1416 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 24 лет и был похоронен в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Peyton nació en 1392, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Peyton, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan Sutton, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Grace Burgoyne aproximadamente 1409, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1416, en su pueblo, a la edad de 24 años, y fue sepultado en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
